svg.title: Spring Boot Microservices Architecture
svg.desc: Order Service on port 8080 calls Product Service on port 8081 via Feign Client to return enriched order data to the client.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client request look like for GET /orders/1?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Order Service code — controller, service, and Feign client')
sendPrompt('How does the Feign Client work in Spring Boot?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Product Service code — controller and service layer')
